steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
The system is:
$x + 5y = 5$
$x - 5y = 7$

Adding the equations eliminates $y$:
$$(x + 5y) + (x - 5y) = 5 + 7$$
$$2x = 12$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 6$$
The Desmos graph below checks the original system: the two lines intersect at a point with $x=6$. That matches choice C. C is correct.
